methodology: Heuristic baseline map. Every row includes org-wide Web platform checks (policy audit, nav route-feature-key gate, production build) plus Flutter static parity tests when Mobile App is in scope. Additional Cypress specs map to feature IDs for advertiser/developer, routing, fraud/AI/SMS/Stripe ops, admin guard, voting-mode, SSO smoke, vote-casting/achievement/integration smokes (mocked REST where applicable). Per-feature GREEN still requires feature-specific proof beyond this baseline.

rows.title: Cryptographic Vote Receipts
rows.statusHint: ⚠️ Partial (cryptographic verification exists, but SHA-256 + RSA receipt spec is not fully confirmed end-to-end)

rows.title: Vote Anonymity via Mixnet
rows.statusHint: ❌ Not implemented/verified (mixnets/ZK-style privacy routing not wired in current Web implementation)

rows.title: Zero-Knowledge Proofs (ZK-SNARKs)
rows.statusHint: ❌ Not implemented/verified (ZK proofs not wired in current Web implementation)

rows.title: Homomorphic Encryption
rows.statusHint: ❌ Not implemented/verified (homomorphic tallying not wired in current Web implementation)

rows.title: Threshold Cryptography
rows.statusHint: ❌ Not implemented/verified (threshold decryption not wired in current Web implementation)
